title: Five Nights At Freddy's Security Breach Remastered
description:
Are you ready to unleash these terrors into YOUR world?
This adds many new entitys and blocks from Fnaf Sb
body:
This mod adds a wide variety of characters, blocks, and item from the FNAF SB Game 
Adds Many mobs like
Dj Music Man
Roxy
Monty
Bonnie
Chica
Freddy
Vanny
etc.

Adds many blocks
such as the remnant extractor
Daycare mats + variants
Soda Machine
Vending machine + variants
Tiles
etc

Info:
Use the extractor to get the remnant out of the cores that the crying children drop and you can infuse remnant with things such as wool or animatronic spawns
